docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEREZ, YAKELIN AS TO DEFENDANT AJACKS RESTAURANTS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA LUNA PARK JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
